electrician: What type of electrical work do you need?
Is it a repair, installation, or replacement?
Are there any exposed wires or immediate safety hazards?
plumber: What plumbing issue are you experiencing?
Do you need pipe replacement or block clearing?
carpenter: What kind of woodwork is needed?
Do you need repair or custom furniture building?
Do you have the materials ready?
ac_technician: What is the issue with your AC?
Is it split AC or Window AC?
Has the AC been serviced in the last 6 months?
painter: Do you require interior or exterior painting?
Will we need to scrape existing paint?
cleaner: Is this a deep clean or regular cleaning?
Do you have pets at home?
driver: What type of vehicle needs driving?
Is it a manual or automatic transmission?
Will this be a round trip or one-way drop?
driver1: What type of vehicle needs driving?
Is it a manual or automatic transmission?
Will this be a round trip or one-way drop?
